name: L5 message batching reduces adjacent text messages
description: When a severe symptom ends a check-in and the engine appends a Brief link, L5 batches the two adjacent text messages into one outbound message.

script.text: I can't breathe and my chest is tight

expectations.description: Adjacent text messages are batched into a single text message
Batched message still contains urgent safety guidance
Batched message also contains the brief link
